response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analysed video and observed two main segments: dialogue (00:00-03:48) and music performance (03:49-04:59).
2. Identified song "ココ☆ナツ" (Coconuts) and composer "前山田 健一" (Kenichi Maeyamada) from on-screen text during the performance.
3. Performed search query: '"ココ☆ナツ" "前山田 健一" Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Extracted Japanese and English lyrics from search results to populate the JSON fields.
response.global_summary: The video begins with a dialogue segment featuring several characters from Hololive English Advent. Following the dialogue, they perform the song "Coconuts," which was originally written and composed by Kenichi Maeyamada (Hyadain).

scenes.description: Dialogue between characters featuring on-screen text.
Characters perform the song "Coconuts". On-screen text indicates the song title and credits.
